title: Delete ALL Your Indicators, and Use Only THIS One! [Perfect for Scalping]
thesis_bullets: This indicator is designed for scalpers.
Alright, on TradingView Platform here, we click on indicators and we search scalping pullback, this one which is written by just uncle L.
Alright, this is the indicator and as you can see it's overlaid on the price chart.
Let me explain what we have here and then I will teach you the trading strategy.
This blue line here is an EMA with length of 200.

We have this green line here which is an EMA length of 89 and this is our fast EMA and then we have this red line here with the two bands above and below that and this is an EMA with length of 34 which is based on close, high and low and this is called price action channel.
You can also have another EMA with an extreme length for identifying major trend of the market.

If we go to the settings of the indicator, here we can turn on the slow EMA which is an EMA with length of 600 and you can see that this gray line here is added to the chart which is an EMA with length of 600 and this is our slow EMA.

So this gray line is slow EMA, the blue line, medium EMA, the green line, fast EMA and this red line with the bands is price action channel which is an EMA with length of 34 based on close, low and high.
All right now let me teach you how you can find buy sell signals based on this indicator.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
